envVars.name: AION_API_KEY
envVars.description: AION SDK API key used for market reads and trade execution.

envVars.name: MARKET_QUERY
envVars.description: Keyword used to discover candidate Polymarket markets, for example bitcoin or election.

envVars.name: THESIS_PROBABILITY
envVars.description: Fair probability from 0 to 1 for the selected thesis.

envVars.name: MIN_EDGE
envVars.description: Minimum edge required before proposing or executing a trade.

envVars.name: TRADE_AMOUNT_USD
envVars.description: Position size in USD per trade.

envVars.name: RUN_LIVE
envVars.description: Set to true to allow live trades without passing --live.
